kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Either Bridgegate goes with 5 coins or someone in the River Ward goes with 5 coins (but not both).
Oldwall goes with at least one of Edmund, Carpenter, or Tanner.
Exactly two of these are true: Matilda goes with Blacksmith; Tanner goes with Millpond; Southgate goes with 7 coins.
If 3 coins does not go with Bridgegate, then at least one of Cooper goes with Highrow, Blacksmith goes with 6 coins, or 4 coins goes with Carpenter.

Wulfric goes with none of Weaver, Eastcheap, or 3 coins.

Godfrey's levy is higher than both the Potter and the artisan in Oldwall.
